title: WA CFS Quarterly Trend Sheet- Q3 2024: Credits Rose by 34.12% in Q3 2024
content:
Key Takeaways:

In the Washington Clean Fuel Standard (WA CFS) market, credit generation rose by 34.12% QoQ, with renewable diesel credits growing by 58.95% QoQ, remaining the leading credit generator, followed by ethanol. In Q3 2024, credits from electricity reached a total of 58,480, excluding credits from Electricity - Metered Residential EV Charging. On the other hand, deficits decreased by 6.20% QoQ.Â
author: Mansift Kaur
